description: A customer in the store is trying to decide between two different models of a coffee maker and asks an associate for help.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two products the customer is considering.

expected_outcome.value: The associate knows which two items to compare.

nodes.task_description: Use a handheld device to bring up a side-by-side comparison of the two models' features.

expected_outcome.value: The system displays a comparison chart of the products.

nodes.task_description: Explain the key differences to the customer (e.g., 'This one has a built-in grinder, while the other one does not').

expected_outcome.value: The associate helps the customer make an informed decision.
